name: Phase 11 Integrations and migration requirements matrix

rows.requirement: Integration adapter foundation and ExternalMapping model
evidence: Phase 11 contract defines adapter foundation, ExternalMapping, idempotency, permissions, and E2E expectations before implementation.

packages/integrations/src/index.ts implements tenant-owned IntegrationAdapterDefinition, IntegrationConnection, ExternalPayloadEnvelope, ExternalMapping, ExternalMappingDiagnostic, AdapterFailure, SyncAuditEvent, deterministic mapping keys, deterministic import idempotency keys, typed validation errors, defensive payload/metadata cloning, and secret-looking diagnostic/audit-detail redaction.

packages/integrations/src/integrationAdapterFoundation.test.ts proves adapter/connection validation, payload immutability, tenant-scoped mapping/idempotency keys, diagnostics and sync-audit redaction, typed adapter failure/audit event creation, and invalid input typed errors.

packages/access-control/src/index.ts defines P11 integration permissions: integration.read, integration.preview, integration.apply, integration.mapping.read, integration.audit.read, and integration.admin.
packages/access-control/src/accessProfile.test.ts proves the P11 integration permissions compose into a tenant-scoped integration admin access profile.

rows.cleanup: P11-009 Playwright tests prove /test-fixtures/reset restores Phase 11 previews, import batches, mappings, sync audit, adapter failure modes, and imported canonical Phase 4 project/task state. E2E-100/E2E-101/E2E-104 verify mappings reset to empty; E2E-102 verifies failure mode clears and preview recovers; E2E-103 verifies imported project is removed after reset.

evidence: Phase 11 contract requires a non-mutating mock adapter preview mapping external payloads to canonical opportunity/project/task data.

packages/integrations/src/index.ts implements createMockAdapterImportPreview with mutatesState=false, deterministic canonical account/contact/opportunity/project/task preview DTOs, validation issues, create/update/skip/error report counts, affected canonical entity refs, and tenant-scoped mapping previews.
Canonical ids are deterministic hash-based ids derived from tenant/source/entity/external id, so external ids do not become canonical ids or readable canonical id suffixes.

packages/integrations/src/mockAdapterImportPreview.test.ts proves canonical preview compatibility with crm-core createOpportunity and project-core createProjectDraftFromOpportunity, non-mutating existing-mapping readback, update/skip detection, validation-report behavior for unsafe payloads, malformed date recovery without throws, and no external-id leakage in canonical ids.

rows.requirement: Idempotent import apply and mapping persistence
evidence: Phase 11 contract requires repeated imports to reuse tenant-scoped mappings and avoid duplicate canonical records.

packages/integrations/src/index.ts implements applyMockAdapterImportPreview with confirmation-required apply, tenant mismatch guard, blocking-preview rejection, idempotent replay by tenant-scoped idempotency key, ExternalMapping persistence DTOs, ImportBatch DTOs, canonical entity refs, SyncAuditEvent evidence, and duplicate batch/audit id conflict validation.

apps/api/src/phase11Runtime.ts implements an in-memory Phase 11 application runtime for preview/apply/readback with tenant-scoped preview storage, tenant-scoped stale-preview versions, tenant-scoped batch/audit storage keys, mapping readback, import batch readback, sync audit readback, and reset support for future API/fixture wiring.

Self bug-hunt fixes in scope: canonical project draft ids no longer expose external project ids; previews for one tenant no longer stale previews for another tenant; same batch/audit ids in different tenants do not overwrite each other.

rows.requirement: Sync audit, retry/rate-limit, and safe failure model
evidence: Phase 11 contract requires structured adapter failures, rate-limit/retry metadata, safe diagnostics, and no partial canonical mutation.

packages/integrations/src/index.ts implements RetryPolicy, RateLimitPolicy, AdapterHealthStatus, expanded AdapterFailureCode support for preview/apply preconditions, positive-integer validation for retry/rate-limit settings, duplicate retryable-code rejection, and failure-message secret redaction.

apps/api/src/phase11Runtime.ts implements tenant-scoped connection failure modes, rate-limited preview failure audit with retryAfterSeconds metadata, invalid-payload preview diagnostics, failed apply audit for stale/cross-tenant/domain precondition rejections, no partial batch/mapping writes on failure, failure-mode recovery, reset cleanup, and protection against overwriting successful audit evidence when a failed apply reuses an audit id.

rows.requirement: Migration validation report and dry-run summary
evidence: Phase 11 contract requires import preview to return validation reports with creates, updates, skips, errors, blockers, sample mappings, and recovery text before apply.

packages/integrations/src/index.ts implements MigrationValidationReport and ImportDryRunSummary DTOs over MockAdapterCanonicalImportPreview. Reports are mutatesState=false, include safeToApply/canApply, create/update/skip/error counts, blocking/warning issue counts, sample mappings, affected canonical refs, and recovery actions without exposing raw adapter payload or canonical payload bodies.

packages/integrations/src/migrationValidationReport.test.ts proves report counts for create/update/skip/warning cases, unsafe blocking previews, recovery blocker/warning text, sample limits, no preview mutation, no raw payload leakage, and typed validation for invalid sample limits.

apps/api/src/phase11Runtime.ts exposes tenant-scoped getMigrationValidationReport and getImportDryRunSummary readback helpers over stored previews. apps/api/src/phase11Runtime.test.ts proves readback is non-mutating, tenant scoped, stale previews are denied before dry-run evidence can greenlight an unapplyable preview, and cross-tenant/missing previews deny without batch/mapping/audit mutation.

rows.requirement: Integrations API and governed import commands
evidence: Phase 11 contract defines adapter, connection, import preview/apply, batch, mapping, audit, and diagnostics API contracts.

apps/api/src/app.ts exposes tenant-scoped P11 routes: GET /api/integrations/adapters, GET /api/integrations/connections, GET /api/integrations/diagnostics, POST/DELETE failure-mode diagnostics test hooks, POST /api/integrations/import/preview, GET /api/integrations/import/previews/:previewId/report, GET /api/integrations/import/previews/:previewId/dry-run, POST /api/integrations/import/apply, GET /api/integrations/import/batches, GET /api/integrations/mappings, and GET /api/integrations/audit.

apps/api/src/app.ts routes validate request bodies, require integration.* backend permissions, scope adapters/connections/previews/batches/mappings/audit to the authenticated tenant, map IntegrationDomainError to typed HTTP errors, and reset Phase 11 runtime state through /test-fixtures/reset.

apps/api/src/phase11IntegrationsApi.test.ts proves deterministic read model routes, non-mutating preview with validation report and dry-run summary readback, governed apply with batch/mapping/audit readback, idempotent replay, stale preview denial without partial mutation, read-only preview/apply denial, Tenant B cross-tenant report/apply denial without Tenant A identifiers in the response, invalid payload diagnostics with no partial writes, rate-limit failure diagnostics, and recovery after clearing adapter failure mode.
Bug-hunt fix: API-generated preview ids are unique per preview request and reset with test fixtures, so an older dry-run token cannot silently apply a newer preview.

evidence: Phase 11 contract defines a Russian Integration Admin Diagnostics control surface with preview/apply, mapping diagnostics, failure panel, and audit readback.

apps/web/src/integrationAdminDiagnosticsApiClient.ts implements the P11 UI API client for adapter, connection, diagnostics, import preview/apply, batches, mappings, audit, and governed failure-mode diagnostics routes through the accepted P11 API.

apps/web/src/IntegrationAdminDiagnosticsSurface.tsx implements a Russian Integration Admin Diagnostics management surface with adapter/connection health, failure diagnostics and recovery, deterministic import preview, validation report, dry-run state, guarded apply command, mapping diagnostics, audit/result feedback, stale-preview recovery, post-apply readback failure recovery, and TanStack Query readback/refetch instead of local-only mutation state.
apps/web/src/App.tsx wires the integration diagnostics surface into the KISS PM app shell and navigation when a P11 integration API client is available.

evidence: Phase 11 contract requires imported canonical projects and tasks to remain operable after the adapter is disconnected or failing.

apps/api/src/app.ts materializes a confirmed Phase 11 import into the canonical Phase 4 project/task runtime after the governed import apply command. The materialization uses the stored import preview and ExternalMapping canonical ids, not a live adapter read, preflights canonical materialization before apply to avoid synced mappings without canonical project readback, and writes integration.import.materialize_project audit evidence.
apps/api/src/phase11Runtime.ts exposes tenant-scoped getImportPreview readback for application-layer materialization while preserving stale/cross-tenant preview guards.

apps/api/src/phase11IntegrationsApi.test.ts proves apply creates canonical project/task readback, adapter failure after import does not prevent /api/projects and task status commands, canonical project responses do not leak raw external project/task ids, task status writes audit evidence, Tenant B cannot read Tenant A imported project details, and /test-fixtures/reset removes the imported canonical project.

apps/web/src/ProjectWorkControlSurface.test.tsx proves the existing Project Work control surface opens an imported project id through canonical Phase 4 API client calls, shows imported task data, changes task status, refreshes Kanban/audit readback, and does not depend on an integration adapter client.
